title: Interaction
description: Schema for Interaction Ascriptions — causal coupling between Mechanisms. Defines the Effector→Receptor binding. DM validates Archetype schema-compatibility between the Effector output and Receptor input. DM input = DM output (1:1). Tenant-defined archetypes extending Interaction MUST reference this schema via allOf.

effector.description: ID reference to the Effector that is the emitting endpoint of this causal coupling.

receptor.description: ID reference to the Receptor that is the receiving endpoint of this causal coupling.
